name: synthetic-bull
description: Full-Stack Exchange Simulator & Algorithmic Trading Terminal

scripts.rebuild: docker-compose down && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.ml:setup: python -m venv ml/.venv && ml/.venv/Scripts/python -m pip install -r ml/requirements.txt

author: IIT Kharagpur Team
